title: No Need For Panic Buying, Our UAE Stores Stocked For 6 Months: LuLu Group
summary_full: With parts of the Middle East facing aviation disruptions due to the conflict, retailers have increasingly turned to dedicated cargo flights to transport perishable food items.
summary_public: With parts of the Middle East facing aviation disruptions due to the conflict, retailers have increasingly turned to dedicated cargo flights to transport perishable food items.
